---
title: "Hjælp til app: Kunstig neuron"
---

Herunder gives en gennemgang af hver af fanerne i [Kunstig Neuron App](https://apps01.math.aau.dk/ai/neuron/){target="_blank"}. Du kan læse mere om matematikken bag i [noten om kunstige neuroner](/noter/kunstige_neuroner/kunstige_neuroner.qmd){target="_blank"}.


<!-- ## <span class="toggle-icon">Data</span> {.collapsible} -->


## [Data]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}


::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include data.qmd >}}

{{< include next.qmd >}}


:::


## [Variable]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include target-variabel.qmd >}}

{{< include target-vaerdi.qmd >}}

{{< include feature-variable.qmd >}}

{{< include next.qmd >}}

:::


## [Træning]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include startvaegte.qmd >}}

{{< include learning_rate.qmd >}}

{{< include antal_iterationer.qmd >}}

{{< include tabsfunktion_binary.qmd >}}

{{< include indstillinger.qmd >}}

{{< include train.qmd >}}

{{< include output_tabsfkt.qmd >}}

{{< include output_vaegte.qmd >}}



<!-- {{< include aktiveringsfunktion.qmd >}} -->


:::


## [Evaluering & Prædiktion]{.toggle-icon} {.collapsible}

::: {.collapse-content}

{{< include eval_pred_binary_klassifikation.qmd >}} 

:::
